venue.venue_name: Duffstein House Of Froth And Smoked Goods

items.badge_description: Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 430 check-ins at venue that is verified.  Try 5 more for Level 87!

user.bio: Drinky drinky, time for less thinky.

items.checkin_comment: Great hazy base as per, passionfruit and stone fruit with some juicy citrus.

venue.venue_name: Duffstein House Of Froth And Smoked Goods

user.bio: Not willing to surrender to the Hazy Monoculture

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 65 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 14!

user.bio: Life is all the stuff I have to do to get from coffee to beer or rather from coffee stouts and porters to other beers.
Beer. Because you can't drink bacon.
